name: Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and crush the entire head of garlic.
2. Remove the crusts from the white bread slices and place them in a mixing bowl.
3. Add the crushed garlic, olive oil, and vinegar to the bread. Let it soften for 1 hour.
4. Beat the mixture with an electric mixer until smooth. Avoid using a food processor as it will result in a too-smooth sauce.
5. Gradually add lemon juice and water while continuing to mix with the electric mixer. Adjust the consistency to achieve a thick and fluffy sauce.
